data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for automatic photo quality checks.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the automatic photo quality check, but the evidence provided does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an automatic photo quality check, yet there are no concrete examples or evidence showing that this requirement is satisfied in the current saga run. Therefore, the validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
gaps: No evidence of automatic photo quality check functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the automatic photo quality check requirement.
